open_questions: Verify shares outstanding and dividend cash history.
Confirm whether component schedule denominator matches economic OTC unit.
thesis: Pinelawn Cemetery is a Long Island cemetery and memorial business based in Farmingdale, New York. **[Fact]** It is organized as a tax-exempt **501(c)(13) cemetery company** (EIN 11-1190044), not a normal SEC reporting corporation. **[Fact]** Common shares trade thinly on OTC Pink as **PLWN**. **[Fact]** FY2024 Form 990 extract shows about **$42.9 million** revenue, **$5.3 million** net income, and **$161.9 million** net assets with liabilities reported at zero on the extract. **[Fact]**
why_market_wrong: The quote may ignore a **land-heavy cemetery franchise** because there is no 10-K and volume is tiny. **[Inference]** Predictive attribute: **market structure discount**. **[Inference]** Equally, aggregator share counts and the indicated **$45.40** dividend may be wrong, so apparent cheapness or richness can be a data error rather than a mispriced asset. **[Inference]** Contract backfill now attaches proof graphs to a provisional component schedule base **~$54 per share** versus a **$575** quote, which reinforces that the denominator or quote quality is the binding question. **[Inference]**
